title: [S1][Phase 1] Define route contract for /templates/classic-storymaps
body:
## Summary
Define the site map and route contract for /templates/classic-storymaps, including landing and phase-1 app routes.

## Objective
Make route behavior explicit before implementation starts.

## Dependencies
None.

## Deliverable
Route matrix for landing and per-app pages.

## Checklist
- [ ] Document landing route and each phase-1 app route.
- [ ] Define canonical URL format for each route.
- [ ] Document query parameter precedence with appid-first behavior.
- [ ] Document optional webmap support where applicable.
- [ ] Add examples for valid and invalid URLs.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Landing route and each phase-1 app route are explicit.
- [ ] URL parameter precedence is documented (appid-first, optional webmap where supported).

## Done Evidence
- [ ] Route matrix is committed and linked in issue comment.
- [ ] Product owner approval is captured.

## Estimate
S (1 day)

## PR Batch
PR1

title: [S2][Phase 1] Define phase-1 app adapters and responsibilities
body:
## Summary
Define adapter responsibilities for Map Tour, Map Journal, and Swipe/Spyglass.

## Objective
Lock per-app input support and viewer-only constraints before shared module implementation.

## Dependencies
S1.

## Deliverable
Adapter matrix for Map Tour, Map Journal, Swipe/Spyglass.

## Checklist
- [ ] Define accepted parameters per app.
- [ ] Define unsupported input cases per app.
- [ ] Document app-specific viewer-only policy.
- [ ] Define guidance text categories for unsupported input.
- [ ] Confirm adapter contract aligns with route contract.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Each app defines accepted parameters and unsupported cases.
- [ ] Viewer-only policy is called out per app.

## Done Evidence
- [ ] Adapter matrix is committed and linked in issue comment.
- [ ] Review sign-off is recorded.

## Estimate
S (1 day)

## PR Batch
PR1

title: [S3][Phase 2] Implement shared appid/webmap validation module
body:
## Summary
Implement reusable parsing and validation logic for appid and webmap inputs across all app pages.

## Objective
Provide consistent validation outcomes and actionable messaging on all phase-1 app pages.

## Dependencies
S2.

## Deliverable
Reusable JS module for parsing and validating appid and webmap input.

## Checklist
- [ ] Implement parser for appid and webmap query parameters.
- [ ] Enforce appid-first precedence.
- [ ] Return normalized validation result structure.
- [ ] Handle empty input with actionable message.
- [ ] Handle malformed input with actionable message.
- [ ] Handle unsupported input with actionable message.
- [ ] Add integration points for per-app adapter rules.
- [ ] Verify response consistency across app pages.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Empty, malformed, and unsupported input paths return actionable messages.
- [ ] Validation responses are consistent across app pages.

## Done Evidence
- [ ] Module is committed and integrated into all phase-1 app pages.
- [ ] Verification transcript is linked in issue comment.

## Estimate
M (2-3 days)

## PR Batch
PR1

title: [S4][Phase 2] Implement shared page shell for app pages
body:
## Summary
Implement shared shell components for all pages: header, breadcrumb, help text, launch CTA, and error panel.

## Objective
Create a consistent and responsive page framework for landing and per-app pages.

## Dependencies
S1.

## Deliverable
Shared HTML, CSS, and JS shell components.

## Checklist
- [ ] Implement shared header.
- [ ] Implement breadcrumb region.
- [ ] Implement help text region.
- [ ] Implement launch CTA area.
- [ ] Implement error panel area.
- [ ] Verify desktop layout behavior.
- [ ] Verify mobile layout behavior.
- [ ] Verify brand assets and thumbnails render correctly.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Desktop and mobile layouts are verified.
- [ ] Brand assets and thumbnails render correctly.

## Done Evidence
- [ ] Shared shell is committed and referenced by page templates.
- [ ] Verification notes are linked in issue comment.

## Estimate
M (2-3 days)

## PR Batch
PR1

title: [S5][Phase 3] Build landing page with app cards and deep links
body:
## Summary
Build the landing page for classic storymaps with thumbnails and deep links to phase-1 app pages.

## Objective
Provide a clear entry point for users to select app viewers.

## Dependencies
S4.

## Deliverable
Landing page at /templates/classic-storymaps.

## Checklist
- [ ] Implement landing page layout using shared shell patterns.
- [ ] Add cards for all phase-1 apps.
- [ ] Add thumbnails and app descriptions.
- [ ] Wire deep links to the correct app routes.
- [ ] Validate navigation behavior on desktop and mobile.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Cards for all phase-1 apps display correctly.
- [ ] Card links route to the right app pages.

## Done Evidence
- [ ] Landing page is committed.
- [ ] Verification notes for links and rendering are linked in issue comment.

## Estimate
S (1 day)

## PR Batch
PR2

title: [S6][Phase 3] Build Map Tour, Map Journal, and Swipe/Spyglass viewer pages
body:
## Summary
Build per-app pages with adapter-driven validation and launch behavior.

## Objective
Deliver phase-1 viewer pages with app-specific unsupported guidance and viewer-only behavior.

## Dependencies
S3, S4.

## Deliverable
Per-app pages with adapter-driven validation and launch behavior.

## Checklist
- [ ] Implement Map Tour page integration.
- [ ] Implement Map Journal page integration.
- [ ] Implement Swipe and Spyglass page integration.
- [ ] Validate known-good appid launch for each app.
- [ ] Show app-specific unsupported input guidance.
- [ ] Provide org-search links for unsupported cases.
- [ ] Verify viewer-only constraints per app.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Known-good appid launches correctly for each app.
- [ ] Unsupported input shows app-specific guidance and org-search links.

## Done Evidence
- [ ] All per-app pages are committed.
- [ ] Positive and negative verification transcript is linked in issue comment.

## Estimate
M (2-3 days)

## PR Batch
PR2

title: [S7][Phase 4] Define IIS deploy boundary and publish process
body:
## Summary
Define package boundary and publish process for /templates/classic-storymaps.

## Objective
Ensure deployable runtime package works under nested IIS path without source-only artifacts.

## Dependencies
S5, S6.

## Deliverable
Packaging checklist and deployment notes.

## Checklist
- [ ] Define required runtime files and folders.
- [ ] Exclude source-only files from publish package.
- [ ] Document publish steps for target IIS path.
- [ ] Verify static assets resolve correctly from nested path.
- [ ] Record package validation notes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Runtime does not require source-only files.
- [ ] Static assets resolve correctly from nested IIS path.

## Done Evidence
- [ ] Packaging checklist is committed.
- [ ] Deployment notes are committed and linked in issue comment.

## Estimate
XS (0.5 day)

## PR Batch
PR3

title: [S8][Phase 4] Configure IIS assets, caching, and fallback behavior
body:
## Summary
Configure IIS to serve landing and app pages correctly with documented cache and fallback behavior.

## Objective
Operationalize hosted behavior at /templates/classic-storymaps.

## Dependencies
S7.

## Deliverable
IIS configuration checklist and validation transcript.

## Checklist
- [ ] Configure serving path for landing and app routes.
- [ ] Validate static asset delivery for nested routes.
- [ ] Apply cache policy per deployment notes.
- [ ] Validate fallback behavior does not break route loading.
- [ ] Capture validation transcript.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Landing and all app pages serve from target path.
- [ ] Cache behavior matches documented policy.

## Done Evidence
- [ ] IIS checklist is committed.
- [ ] Validation transcript is attached or linked in issue comment.

## Estimate
M (2-3 days)

## PR Batch
PR3

title: [S9][Phase 5] Create release workflow runbook with rollback
body:
## Summary
Define release workflow from sync through rollback, including required release metadata.

## Objective
Make repeatable releases and recovery explicit and testable.

## Dependencies
S7, S8.

## Deliverable
Release runbook.

## Checklist
- [ ] Document sync step.
- [ ] Document build and package step.
- [ ] Document pre-publish test step.
- [ ] Document publish step.
- [ ] Document rollback step.
- [ ] Add required release notes fields for commit SHA and deployment timestamp.
- [ ] Validate rollback instructions with a rehearsal.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Release notes capture commit SHA and deployment timestamp.
- [ ] Rollback instructions are explicit and tested.

## Done Evidence
- [ ] Runbook is committed.
- [ ] Rollback rehearsal results are linked in issue comment.

## Estimate
S (1 day)

## PR Batch
PR3

title: [S10][Phase 5] Define and baseline release smoke test suite
body:
## Summary
Define smoke suite for valid, invalid, missing, and unsupported input coverage for every release.

## Objective
Ensure stable launch and validation behavior before and after publication.

## Dependencies
S6, S8.

## Deliverable
Smoke checklist covering valid, invalid, missing, and unsupported input.

## Checklist
- [ ] Define positive launch checks for each phase-1 app page.
- [ ] Define invalid input checks for each app page.
- [ ] Define missing input checks for each app page.
- [ ] Define unsupported input checks for each app page.
- [ ] Define viewer-only constraint checks for each app.
- [ ] Define pass and fail recording format for release evidence.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All phase-1 app pages pass positive and negative tests.
- [ ] Viewer-only constraints are validated.

## Done Evidence
- [ ] Smoke checklist is committed.
- [ ] Baseline smoke execution transcript is linked in issue comment.

## Estimate
S (1 day)

## PR Batch
PR3
